title: Update preact to version 6.2.0 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [preact](https://www.npmjs.com/package/preact) just published its new version 6.2.0.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency preact
New version 6.2.0
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of preact. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 24 commits . - [`5f3189e`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/5f3189ec56608e9779ac1359b212d560c32eed3d) 6.2.0 - [`6bfa2af`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/6bfa2af9f5d2fb48c3e3b075b3f5e6dc85c4749c) Drop a few bytes off the render queue. - [`1475824`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/14758246ff8c97232ba648d9d154e4bad080c053) Fix: Re-add `Component.prototype.render` since libraries like `preact-compat` use that to determine if a function is a pure functional component or a classful component. Instead of returning `null`, it is now empty. - [`11ac72a`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/11ac72a6abc0fc7c86da9a0ed98e90a212efeef5) Inline remaining `empty()` calls. - [`9467e2a`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/9467e2ab893b7b3a487fa23e0dec490cceb7914c) Consolidate prop cache check + populate into the diff entry. - [`c289ce6`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/c289ce62c2f808951814ad60db53bc8aca6dbf2b) Switch to lazy empty check - [`cc03a7a`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/cc03a7a579c9dffcd599ad075b6562a6ff0b34e9) Add performance test for JSX VNode creation. - [`49893be`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/49893beb162f9bad16a71b85c07d756ba8644e2c) Tests: if `NODE_ENV=production`, run performance tests against `preact.min.js`. - [`e973347`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/e973347b54fda46ed5d601d6e5b87f52f814b896) Remove tests for `getInitialState()`, which is no longer unofficially supported in Preact core (it is still supported in `preact-compat`). - [`e083f35`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/e083f3583c2f0a632a45c2d4c538e4ac036b07ef) Add tests for nested children 👯 - [`f389dd3`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/f389dd376c8fc90e92eb643583afbc0a49dc8930) Remove unnecessary early exit for a condition that rarely/never occurs. - [`b1e1704`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/b1e17045ec6d1fbf41c17c58ed6d22149616a6e3) Fix sort-of regression in `6.1.0` whether state changes in `componentDidUpdate()` resulted in synchronous re-renders. - [`ee4f61c`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/ee4f61c8f4ffb017b4afaca44b59472b268f4b41) `._disableRendering` --> `._disable` to save a few bytes - [`2e75116`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/2e751162a2cb51ff5b45309e60468e89215612dd) Remove unnecessary uses of `empty()` - [`45c12ef`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/45c12efdb5a047e73288bc07fe9aae1399617e63) Potentially breaking change: remove undocumented support for `getInitialState()` on classful components. This has never been part of the API but was left in core in order to support `preact-compat`'s use. It is now being moved into `preact-compat`. This allows preact to normalize class components that don't inherit from Component. There are 24 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/developit/preact/compare/7ade27579ffce259fa34be58ef48e6bbdd1919b4...5f3189ec56608e9779ac1359b212d560c32eed3d). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
